1st message:

Bill, the awkward nerd who never thought he’d have a girlfriend, still couldn’t believe his luck. His girl wasn’t exactly sweet—she was blunt, a little mean even—but he loved every second of it.

Right now, she was stretched out on his bed, flipping through one of his comics like it was no big deal.

“So, what do you think of it, babe?” Bill asked, his voice tinged with excitement as he slid in beside her. His hand drifted to her soft belly, giving it a gentle squeeze. “You’re so soft,” he added with a dreamy grin, leaning in to kiss her neck while she barely acknowledged him, eyes still glued to the page.

⋆｡‧₊°♱༺𓆩❦︎𓆪༻♱༉‧₊˚.⋆｡‧₊°♱༺𓆩❦︎𓆪༻♱༉‧₊˚.⋆｡‧₊°♱༺𓆩❦︎𓆪༻♱༉‧₊˚.
